data.name: Company has an approved Information Security Policy (AUP)
data.description:
This test verifies that your company has an approved [Information Security Policy (AUP)](/policies/information-security-policy-bsi) in Vanta.

> **Information Security Policy (BSI)**: A formal document that outlines the organization's approach to protecting information assets, ensuring confidentiality, integrity, and availability across systems and processes.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Information Security Policy (AUP) yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Information%20Security%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Information Security Policy (AUP) for your company.

data.name: Company has an approved Information Security Roles and Responsibilities
data.description:
This test verifies that your company has an approved [Information Security Roles and Responsibilities](/policies/information-security-roles-and-responsibilities-bsi) in Vanta.

> **Information Security Roles and Responsibilities Policy (BSI)**: Defines the responsibilities and expectations for individuals and teams involved in managing and protecting the organization's information assets.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Information Security Roles and Responsibilities yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Information%20Security%20Roles%20and%20Responsibilities) to create and approve a custom Information Security Roles and Responsibilities for your company.

data.name: Company has an approved Operations Security Policy

This test verifies that your company has an approved [Operations Security Policy](/policies/operations-security-policy-bsi) in Vanta.

> **Operations Security Policy (BSI)**: Establishes guidelines and controls to manage the day-to-day security of systems, networks, and operational processes, helping to reduce the risk of unauthorized access or disruption.
